designPreferences.desiredFeel:
Outlaw Feed needs to decide what "Outlaw" means visually before a single page is built. The name is the brand's biggest asset and is completely unexploited on the current site. Two viable paths:

Option A — Rugged Texas Ranch Brand

Color palette: Deep charcoal/black, weathered leather brown, burnt orange, and cream

Typography: Slab serifs (Rockwell, Playfair Display Condensed) paired with a clean sans-serif for body

Imagery: Texas landscape, working ranch dogs, hunting dogs in the field, ingredient close-ups (raw meat, not mystery meal)

Vibe: Think Yeti, Tecovas, or ARIAT — premium Texas heritage without the kitsch
designPreferences.desiredFeatures:
Home
├── Products
│   ├── Gold Formula
│   └── Blue Formula
├── Why Outlaw
│   ├── Ingredients
│   └── Our Story
├── Where to Buy
│   └── [Retailer Map + Store Finder]
├── Feeding Guide / FAQ
├── Blog / Resources
│   ├── Dog nutrition articles
│   └── Hunting dog care tips
└── Contact
This structure creates landing pages for every SEO keyword cluster the brand should own: "Texas-made dog food," "no corn wheat soy dog food," "dog food for hunting dogs," "working dog food Bell County TX."

3. Homepage Must-Haves
Above the Fold:

Full-width hero image: A working ranch or hunting dog with a bag of Outlaw prominently featured

Tagline that weaponizes the brand name: "Made in Texas. Made to Work." or "No Fillers. No Compromise. No Apologies."

Two CTAs: Find a Store Near You + Shop Online (or Order by Phone until e-commerce is live)

Proof Strip (right below hero):

"No Corn. No Wheat. No Soy." | "Made in Texas" | "AAFCO Certified" | "Real Meat — First Ingredient"

Product Showcase Section:

Card-style layout for Gold and Blue formulas with bag images, key stats (protein %, protein source), and a "Learn More" CTA

Why Outlaw Section:

3-column: Real Ingredients | Life Stage Formulas | Texas Made

Short supporting copy under each icon, linked to deeper pages

Retailer Map Section:

Embedded Google Map with all current retail partners pinned — this alone would help local SEO dramatically

Social Proof:

3-5 customer reviews (real ones from Instagram @outlawfeed or Yelp)

UGC photo strip from Instagram

Email Capture Footer:

Offer: "Get $5 off your next bag — join the Outlaw Pack"

4. Product Pages (Critical Fix)
Each formula page must include:

High-quality bag photography (multiple angles + lifestyle shots)

Guaranteed Analysis panel (crude protein %, crude fat %, crude fiber %, moisture %)

Ingredients list — fully spelled out, not paraphrased

Key benefits (bulleted, scannable)

Feeding guide (by dog weight and activity level)

"Who This Formula Is For" section — hunting dogs, working dogs, puppies, adults

AAFCO statement with life stage callout

Where to buy this formula (retailer list filtered by product)

Customer reviews (even 5-10 reviews beat zero)

5. "Where to Buy" Page Upgrade
The current page is a plain list of store names and addresses. This needs to become:

An interactive Google Map with all retail locations pinned

Each location card with phone, address, hours, and distance (auto-calculated)

A "Don't see your area?" section linking to the phone/contact form

Bell County delivery callout prominently re-featured

Schema markup for LocalBusiness SEO

6. SEO Architecture
Outlaw's current site has essentially no SEO foundation. Priority fixes:

Title tags and meta descriptions for every page (currently generic/missing)

Schema markup: LocalBusiness, Product, FAQPage, Review

Google Business Profile optimization (photos, categories, Q&A, posts)

Blog content targets: "best dog food for hunting dogs," "no corn dog food Texas," "working dog nutrition," "how much to feed a ranch dog"

NAP consistency (Name, Address, Phone) across all online directories — currently inconsistent

Image optimization: Product images with keyword-rich alt text (e.g., "outlaw-feed-gold-formula-dog-food-50lb-bag.jpg")

Core Web Vitals: Speed, mobile responsiveness, layout stability

7. Features to Add (Phased)
Phase 1 (Rebuild Launch):

Mobile-first responsive design

Product pages with full specs

Interactive store locator map

Contact form (not just phone)

Email capture with lead magnet

Google Analytics 4 + GTM + Search Console setup

Blog (minimum 4 launch posts)
